/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc libzdbg_core.a CMakeFiles/zdbg_core.dir/src/regs.c.obj CMakeFiles/zdbg_core.dir/src/mem.c.obj CMakeFiles/zdbg_core.dir/src/expr.c.obj CMakeFiles/zdbg_core.dir/src/bp.c.obj CMakeFiles/zdbg_core.dir/src/hwbp.c.obj CMakeFiles/zdbg_core.dir/src/maps.c.obj CMakeFiles/zdbg_core.dir/src/symbols.c.obj CMakeFiles/zdbg_core.dir/src/tinyasm.c.obj CMakeFiles/zdbg_core.dir/src/tinydis.c.obj CMakeFiles/zdbg_core.dir/src/target.c.obj CMakeFiles/zdbg_core.dir/src/target_null.c.obj CMakeFiles/zdbg_core.dir/src/signal.c.obj CMakeFiles/zdbg_core.dir/src/patch.c.obj CMakeFiles/zdbg_core.dir/src/cmd.c.obj CMakeFiles/zdbg_core.dir/src/repl.c.obj CMakeFiles/zdbg_core.dir/src/os_windows/target_windows.c.obj
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ranlib libzdbg_core.a
